channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Warns Israel, Iran To "Stop Shooting", Then Makes A Ceasefire Claim

media:content.media:description: Trump posted on Truth Social that Israel and Iran were seeking an immediate ceasefire.

item.description: Israel and Iran fired missiles at each other on Monday in the most serious escalation of conflict after a ceasefire was announced in April.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Iran fired missiles at each other on Monday in the most serious escalation of conflict after a ceasefire was announced in April.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Kashmir Nobody Mentions - And How Pakistan Is Quietly Profiting From That
item.description: Recent elections in Gilgit Baltistan - and the protest note India had to issue for them - lay bare concerning but oft-ignored realities.
item.content:encoded: Recent elections in Gilgit Baltistan - and the protest note India had to issue for them - lay bare concerning but oft-ignored realities.

item.title: US Iran War Live: Trump Asks Israel, Iran To Stop 'Shooting' Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

item.title: OpenAI's New Lockdown Mode Is Basically ChatGPT In A Straightjacket
item.description: OpenAI's new security feature deliberately disables some of ChatGPT's most powerful capabilities to protect sensitive data from emerging AI attacks
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new security feature deliberately disables some of ChatGPT's most powerful capabilities to protect sensitive data from emerging AI attacks

item.title: At Least 32 Dead, 200 Injured In 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake In Philippines

media:content.media:description: It was the strongest quake to strike the Philippines this year.

item.description: A few buildings collapsed and key infrastructure sustained quake damage in the city of General Santos, and tsunami damage was reported in at least one coastal village.
item.content:encoded: A few buildings collapsed and key infrastructure sustained quake damage in the city of General Santos, and tsunami damage was reported in at least one coastal village.

item.title: 19 Dead, 200 Injured As 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Philippines, Triggers Tsunami

media:content.media:description: Philippines is often hit by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions.

item.description: 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Philippines, Tsunami Warning Issued
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1110098/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Philippines, Tsunami Warning Issued

item.title: Pay Anyone To Do Anything: The 'Black Mirror' Task App Just Went Live

media:content.media:description: Arivu, a Tamil Nadu resident, took up one of the challenges posted on the site

item.description: Within a week of going live, users have posted hundreds of challenges, with some offering rewards worth tens of thousands of dollars.
item.content:encoded: Within a week of going live, users have posted hundreds of challenges, with some offering rewards worth tens of thousands of dollars.

item.title: Hormuz Will Be Open But With Transit Fees, Says Iran's Envoy To Moscow

media:content.media:description: The US-Israeli war on Iran has largely cut oil flows via the strait.

item.description: The Strait of Hormuz will be open but under new conditions to be set by Iran and Oman, including a transit fee, Iran's ambassador to Moscow was quoted as saying on Monday. The U.S.
item.content:encoded: The Strait of Hormuz will be open but under new conditions to be set by Iran and Oman, including a transit fee, Iran's ambassador to Moscow was quoted as saying on Monday. The U.S.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Agreed To No Nuclear Weapons, Experts Not Convinced

media:content.media:description: Trump has repeatedly said that Iran has agreed not to build a nuclear weapon.

item.description: According to the White House, Trump has said at least 74 times since 2011 that Iran must never obtain a nuclear weapon.
item.content:encoded: According to the White House, Trump has said at least 74 times since 2011 that Iran must never obtain a nuclear weapon.

item.title: Chinese Teacher Suspended And Investigated After Using Glue Gun On 4-Year-Old's Lip
item.description: The girl's mother, Zhou, said she was heartbroken after watching the footage with officers.
item.content:encoded: The girl's mother, Zhou, said she was heartbroken after watching the footage with officers.

item.title: Lebanon's Crusader Castle Seized By Israel A Symbol Of Bloody History

media:content.media:description: Beaufort castle has long been the region's strategic keystone.

item.description: When Israeli forces entered the 900-year-old castle on Saturday, they were returning to a fortress they held throughout their 1982-2000 presence in southern Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: When Israeli forces entered the 900-year-old castle on Saturday, they were returning to a fortress they held throughout their 1982-2000 presence in southern Lebanon.

item.title: As World Focuses On AI, China Holds The Key In Critical Minerals Race
item.description: From lithium to rare earths, Beijing controls the mines, refineries and ports that power AI, EVs and defense systems and India's import dependence makes it especially vulnerable.
item.content:encoded: From lithium to rare earths, Beijing controls the mines, refineries and ports that power AI, EVs and defense systems and India's import dependence makes it especially vulnerable.

item.title: How Indian Mother's Facebook Plea Helped Her Return From UAE After Years

media:content.media:description: Mahananda said the company she was working for, was not telling her to return home.

item.description: As officials at the Indian Consulate General looked for Mahananda, her video found its way into their feeds, setting off efforts to trace her, free her, and fly her home.
item.content:encoded: As officials at the Indian Consulate General looked for Mahananda, her video found its way into their feeds, setting off efforts to trace her, free her, and fly her home.

item.title: Russia Turns To Universities And Technical Colleges For New Recruits

media:content.media:description: Russian universities push student enlistment with incentives amid ongoing war.

item.description: Students are reportedly being offered academic incentives in exchange for signing military contracts
item.content:encoded: Students are reportedly being offered academic incentives in exchange for signing military contracts

item.title: Drone Crash In Background, Ukrainian Couple Continues Wedding Photoshoot

media:content.media:description: The clip has garnered attention online, with many viewers describing it as a symbol of the resilience.

item.description: The Ukrainian air defence system shot down a Russian Shahed drone flying overhead in the southeastern city of Zaporizhzhia.
item.content:encoded: The Ukrainian air defence system shot down a Russian Shahed drone flying overhead in the southeastern city of Zaporizhzhia.

item.title: Video: Mall Crumbles, Families Run For Safety As Quake Jolts Philippines

media:content.media:description: Preliminary assessments also indicate that at least 37 buildings have been damaged.

item.description: Authorities have kept tsunami warnings in place after monitoring stations continued to record tsunami waves and sea-level disturbances following the quake.
item.content:encoded: Authorities have kept tsunami warnings in place after monitoring stations continued to record tsunami waves and sea-level disturbances following the quake.

item.title: Meta Cut 8,000 Jobs. She Kept Hers, But Lost Her Team And Title

media:content.media:description: Three years on, Meta job cuts have expanded from 11,000 to more than 30,000.

item.description: In April, Meta employees were told that 8,000 or 10 per cent of the workforce would be laid off in May as the company readied itself for the era of artificial intelligence. Thousands more would be reassigned to AI initiatives.
item.content:encoded: In April, Meta employees were told that 8,000 or 10 per cent of the workforce would be laid off in May as the company readied itself for the era of artificial intelligence. Thousands more would be reassigned to AI initiatives.

item.title: Iran Attacks 2 Israeli Airbases, Israel Hits Back At Mahshahr Petrochemical Plant

media:content.media:description: The Israeli military said its air defences intercepted missiles from at 3 barrages

item.description: Iran Fires Missiles Into Israel In A First Since April Ceasefire, Iraq, Syria Shut Airspace

item.title: Video: Private Jet In Flames During Emergency Landing In Dominican Republic, 2 Dead

media:content.media:description: The US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas

item.description: According to US media reports, the US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas, when it declared an emergency due to severe mechanical problems.
item.content:encoded: According to US media reports, the US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas, when it declared an emergency due to severe mechanical problems.

item.title: US Considers Buying Chagos Islands: Report

media:content.media:description: Britain put on hold its deal to cede sovereignty of the Chagos Islands.

item.description: The White House is considering a plan to buy the Chagos Islands from Mauritius, the Telegraph reported on Sunday. U.S. officials have drawn up a proposal to bypass the U.K. and make
item.content:encoded: The White House is considering a plan to buy the Chagos Islands from Mauritius, the Telegraph reported on Sunday. U.S. officials have drawn up a proposal to bypass the U.K. and make
